title: Data screen unit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''data screen unit''' ('''DSU''') was a unit of data storage measurement that was based on the amount of data that could be displayed on a standard [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|212|DSU}}</ref> [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon's]] report on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that had been commissioned by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] was 168,000 DSUs in length, and would have taken an individual over seven hundred [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to read in its entirety. However, this estimate relied on the reader achieving a high reading rate of one screen every fifteen [[Standard second|seconds]].<ref name="RASB">''[[Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''</ref> The [[Task Force on Alliance Security]]'s report into major threats to the Rebellion totalled 9,200 DSUs.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> The [[Companion2000]] datapad had a storage capacity of five million DSUs.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>
